#!/usr/bin/env bash
# shellcheck disable=SC2148,SC2329

Describe 'fish function test coverage'

Parameters:dynamic
for file in $(git ls-files 'home-manager/programs/fish/functions/*.fish'); do
  fname=$(basename "$file" .fish)
  %data "$fname" "$file"
done
End

It "has a fishtape test file: $1"
The path "spec/fish/${1}_test.fish" should be exist
End

End

set fn (status dirname)/../../home-manager/programs/fish/functions
source $fn/_coxe_function.fish

# ── no args: interactive mode ─────────────────────────────
set log1 (mktemp)
function codex; echo $argv >> $log1; end

_coxe_function

@test "no args calls codex without exec" (grep -c "^exec " $log1) -eq 0

# ── with args: exec mode ──────────────────────────────────
set log2 (mktemp)
function codex; echo $argv >> $log2; end

_coxe_function hello world

@test "with args uses exec subcommand" (grep -c "^exec " $log2) -ge 1
@test "with args builds prompt" (grep -c "hello world" $log2) -ge 1

rm -f $log1 $log2

file.content:
function _coxe_function --description "Run Codex with a free-form prompt"
  # Run Codex with a free-form prompt (spaces allowed)
  # Usage: cxe [<prompt words...>]

  if test (count $argv) -eq 0
    codex --model '__GPT_CODEX__' --full-auto -c model_reasoning_summary_format=experimental
  else
    set -l prompt (string join " " -- $argv)
    codex exec --model '__GPT_CODEX__' --full-auto -c model_reasoning_summary_format=experimental -- "$prompt"
  end
end

file.content:
function _coxeh_function --description "Run Codex headlessly with a prompted input"
  # Prompt for input and run Codex
  # Usage: coxeh

  read -P "Prompt: " prompt
  if test -z "$prompt"
    echo "No prompt provided, aborting." >&2
    return 1
  end

  codex exec --model '__GPT_CODEX__' --full-auto -c model_reasoning_summary_format=experimental -- "$prompt"
end

content.text:
Created two missing test files:
- `spec/fish/_coxe_function.tpl_test.fish` — mirrors `_coxe_function_test.fish` but sources the `.tpl.fish` variant
- `spec/fish/_coxeh_function.tpl_test.fish` — mirrors `_coxeh_function_test.fish` but sources the `.tpl.fish` variant

The spec at `spec/fish_functions_coverage_spec.sh:14` iterates all `home-manager/programs/fish/functions/*.fish` files and expects a corresponding `spec/fish/<basename>_test.fish`. The `.tpl.fish` files existed without matching tests — these new files satisfy that requirement.
